Configuration for FTDI interface with specific VID/PID and signal layout settings.

# Purpose
This configuration file defines settings for an FTDI interface. It specifies the vendor and product IDs using `ftdi_vid_pid` to identify compatible devices. The file configures the initial layout of the FTDI chip with `ftdi_layout_init`, setting the output and direction values. It also defines signals for `nTRST` and `nSRST` with specific data and output enable values. Additionally, it configures an LED signal with inverted output logic, where a low signal turns the LED on.
